title: Forza Horizon 6: On The Rise Photo Challenge Guide
summary: Here's how to complete the #OnTheRise photo challenge during the spring season of the Horizon Decades festival playlist.

fullArticle:
Forza Horizon 6 welcomes the final season of its Horizon Decades festival playlist this week, bringing with it a fresh batch of challenges to complete on your way to earning the final rewards of the series. As usual, there's a lot to complete this week, including a brand-new photo challenge called On the Rise.

On the Rise asks you to take a photo of any car from the 2010s while in the air. Luckily, this isn't a terribly difficult task to pull off, but you'll still want to be sure you're not wasting any unnecessary time or money on this. We've got you covered with a cheap and effective way to pull it off below. Here's how to complete the On the Rise photo challenge in Forza Horizon 6.
